description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a mix of large floor-to-ceiling windows and solid wall sections, allowing for ample natural light in the main living areas. The exterior is clad in horizontal siding, primarily in light gray, with contrasting darker trim and a spacious front deck area. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch with a bench and potted plants, while the rear and side facades are more private, with fewer and smaller windows. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the interior layout is visible through the expansive glass, revealing open-plan living spaces and distinct rooms. The structure sits on a raised platform, which extends to form a generous outdoor area. Overall, the bungalow combines functional urban living with stylish, minimalist aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, light gray siding, and a spacious front deck, blending contemporary style with open, airy living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, bench, and large windows revealing the living area.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal windows, highlighting the extended deck and the solid wall sections for privacy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, a bench, and a clear view into the open-plan interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of solid wall and window, showing the raised platform and partial interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
